title: TUIALHTHEI CHUNGCHANGA LAWNGTLAI BAWRHSAP THUCHHUAH
content:
852/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 5th June 2026:Lawngtlai District chhungah Tuialhthei harsatnain ziaawm lam a pan zel nia hriat a nih angin Lawngtlai Bawrhsap chuan a hnuaia mi ang hian thuchhuah a siam.

ORDER

No.J.11013/1/2025- DC(LTI): Tunlaiin Lawngtlai District chhungah Tuialhthei harsatna in ziaawm lam a pan zel nia hriat a ni a.

Chuvangin Inkhuahkhirhna thupek Bharatiya Nagarik Suraksha Sanhita, 2023 (BNSS), Section 163 hmanga Tuialhthei khuahkhirhna thupek a lo chhuah tawh vide Order No.J.11013/1/2025- DC (LTI): Dt.22.05.2026 - chu vawiin Order chhuah atanga thu leh awm hma atan sut a ni e.

He thupek hi vawiin Dt.04.06.2026 hian District Magistrate Seal a nemnghetin hming ka ziah hnan e.

Sd/-

DONNY LALRUATSANGA

District Magistrate

Lawngtlai District, Lawngtlai

Attachment

title: HEALTH & FAMILY WELFARE MINISTER ATTENDS ASSET HANDING OVER CEREMONY AT ZORAM MEDICAL COLLEGE & HOSPITAL (ZMC&H)
content:
145/2026-2027

Aizawl, 5 June 2026:Health & Family Welfare Minister, Pi Lalrinpuii, today attended as the chief guest at the Asset Handing Over Ceremony organized for the donation of critical care equipment and an Advanced Life Support Ambulance to Zoram Medical College & Hospital (ZMC&H) under the Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) initiative of Indian Oil Corporation Limited (IOCL).

Speaking at the ceremony, which was organized by the Medical Superintendent of ZMC&H, the Minister expressed her gratitude to IOCL for its support towards the advancement of healthcare services in Mizoram. She stated that the donation, valued at ₹62,38,548, comprising a C-Arm Machine, Diathermy Machine, and an Advanced Life Support Ambulance, demonstrates the corporation’s commitment to public health and patient welfare. She emphasized that the contribution is not merely a donation of equipment but an important investment in saving lives, strengthening emergency care services, and advancing surgical capabilities in the state.

Pi Lalrinpuii also highlighted the need for further development in the field of neurosurgery in Mizoram. She noted that many patients requiring neurosurgical care are still compelled to seek treatment outside the state due to the lack of specialized facilities. She informed the gathering that a proposal for establishing a dedicated Neurosurgery Unit has already been prepared and that additional medical equipment will be required for its implementation. She therefore invited IOCL to continue its partnership and support in the future.

On the occasion, Pi Malati Malakar, Chief Manager (HR-CSR), IOCL, addressed the gathering as the guest of honour. She described the event as a significant milestone in the continued progress of Mizoram’s healthcare system. She reiterated IOCL’s commitment to the development of the North Eastern States and explained that, under Government of India CSR guidelines, corporations are required to allocate two percent of their profits towards social development initiatives. She stated that IOCL consistently contributes beyond this requirement. She further expressed hope that the people of Mizoram would continue to regard healthcare as a fundamental right and affirmed IOCL’s commitment to sustaining a strong partnership with the state in the years ahead.

The newly donated C-Arm Machine will support services in Orthopaedics, General Surgery, Urology, and Trauma Care. The Diathermy Machine will contribute significantly to safer and more efficient surgical procedures, while the Advanced Life Support Ambulance will enable faster and safer transportation of critically ill patients and facilitate treatment during transit.

The ceremony was attended by officials of Indian Oil Corporation Limited. Prof. Zoramthanga Zadeng, Director of Zoram Medical College & Hospital, delivered the vote of thanks, following which the programme concluded.

title: HEALTH & FAMILY WELFARE MINISTER-IN ZORAM MEDICAL COLLEGE & HOSPITAL (ZMC&H)-AH  ASSET HANDING OVER CEREMONY HMANPUI
content:
851/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 5th June 2026:Vawiin khan Health & Family Welfare Minister Pi Lalrinpuii chuan Indian Oil Corporation Limited (IOCL)-in Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) initiative hnuaia Zoram Medical College & Hospital-a damlo na zual enkawlna tur khawl changkang (critical care equipment) leh advanced life support ambulance an hlanna (donation) inkhawm ‘asset handing over ceremony’ chu khuallain niin a hmanpui.

Medical Superintendent, ZMC&H pisaa khawl inhlanchhawn pual inkhawm buatsaihah Minister Pi Lalrinpuii chuan Indian Oil Corporation Limited te chungah lawmthu sawiin Mizoram Healthcare Service hmasawn zelna atan cheng ₹62,38,548/- zet hu (C-arm machine, Diathermy Machine leh advanced life support ambulance) hmanga an puihna chu khawtlang hriselna leh damlote himna an ngaihpawimawhzia tilangtu a ni, a ti a. He an thilpek hlu tak hi hmanrua a nih mai bakah, Mizoram mipuite nunna chhanhimna te, rikrum thila rang zawka inenkawlna leh surgery (inzaina) lama ram hmasawnna atana investment pawimawh tak a nih thu a sawi bawk.

Pi Lalrinpuii chuan Mizoramin neurosurgery lama hmasawnna tur an la ngahzia sawiin damlo neurosurgical care lam mamawhte chuan loh theih lohna avangin state pawn lama inenkawlna an zawn a ngai thin, a ti a. Neurosurgery Unit dinna tur proposal (rawtna) pawh siam fel a nih tawh thu leh hemi atan pawha khawl bungrua an la mamawh thu te sawi bawkin Indian Oil Corporation Limited-te chu nakin zel atan pawh thawhpuiah a sawm a ni.

He hunah hian IOCL Chief Manager (HR-CSR) Pi Malati Malakar chu khual zahawm niin thu a sawi a. He hun hlu tak hi Mizoram Healthcare System-in hma a sawn zelna atana lungphum pawimawh tak a ni, a ti a. Indian Oil Corporation Ltd. chuan India hmarchhak state-te chu an ngaihpawimawhzia tarlangin sawkar danin Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) hnuaia corporation-te a phut thin: an hlawkna tel (profit) atanga za zela pahnih (2%) khawtlang hmasawnna atana hman tur aia tam an pekchhuah thin thu a sawi a. Mizoram mipuite chuan healthcare chu an dikna chanvo a ni tih hre reng tura chahin hun lo kal zel turah pawh thawhhona tha tak an neih chhunzawm zel a beisei tih a sawi bawk a ni. \C-Arm Machine hian Orthopaedics (ruh), General Surgery, Urology leh Trauma Care lamah puiin, diathermy machine hian surgery him zawk neihna kawngah nasa takin a pui thei dawn a, advanced life support ambulance hian damlo dinhmun hlauhawma dingte him leh rang zawka phurhna leh ambulance chhunga treatment pek theihna kawngah a pui thei dawn a ni.\He ceremony hi Indian Oil Corporation Limited (OICL) official thenkhatte chuan lo telpuiin, Zoram Medical College & Hospital Director Prof. Zoramthanga Zadeng chuan lawmthu sawina a nei a, he inkhawm hi a khar a ni.

title: SOLID WASTE MANAGEMENT, RULES 2026 CHUNGCHANGAH LAWNGTLAI BAWRHSAP HOVA THUTKHAWMNA NEIH A NI
content:
850/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, the 5th June, 2026:Nimin chawhma dar 11:00 AM khan DC's Conference Hall, Lawngtlaiah Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga kaihhruaiin Solid Waste Management (SWM) chungchangah thukhawmna neih a ni.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan kalkhawmte chibai  bukna a nei  a. Supreme Court thuchhuah siam angin Lawngtlai District chhunga  bawlhhlawh sawngbawl kawngah Solid Waste Management (SWM)  Rules, 2026 angin ruahmanna kalpui mêk a nih thu a sawi a. SWM Rules 2026 kalpui turin Department mawhphurhna neite bakah Village Council, NGO leh mipuite an pawimawh hle tih tarlangin, theihtawpa sawrkar hmalakna thlawp turin a sâwm nghal  a ni.

Pi Margaret J Vanlalremmawii, SDO (Sadar) leh Memeber Secretary nibawk chuan Solid Waste Managment, Rules 2026 bawhzuina atana hmalakna hrang hrang report a  pe a. District Action Plan siam tawh niin Mizoram Polution Control Board - ah thehluh anih thute, Special Cell, District Level Task Force Committe on SWM, Grieveance Redresal Commitee-  din a nih thu leh Nodal Officer ruatfel a nih tawh thu a tarlang a . SWM Rule 2026-  in a phut hrang hrangte leh tih tur a bi tuk te phak ngei thei tura hmalak mek zel a nih thu a sawi bawk.

Thutkhawmah  hian Lawngtlai District Level Committee on Solid Waste Management Rules 2026,  Member- te an tel tha hle a, Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan lawmthu sawiin thutkhawm  a khar.

Attachment

title: NATIONAL PANCHAYAT AWARDS CEREMONY – 2026 AH KAWRTHAH VILLAGE COUNCIL TEN LAWMMAN DAWNG
content:
849/2026-2027

Aizawl the 5th June, 2026:Ministry of Panchayat Raj (MoPR) buatsaihin June Ni 3, 2026 (Nilaini) khan Scope Convention Centre, New Delhi-ah National Panchayat Awards Ceremony – 2026 programme hman a ni a, he hunah hian Mizoram atangin Kawrthah North Village Council chuan intihsiakna category pakhat Deen Dayal Upadhyay Panchayat Satat Vikas Puraskar hnuaiah lawmman an dawng.

India ram chhunga Panchayats/ Village Council te zinga India Ram Pum huap lawmman (National Panchayat Award) hmute chawimawina leh lawmpuina hun buatsaih ah hian Union Minister of Panchayati Raj, Pu Rajiv Ranjan Singh chuan category hrang hranga National Panchayat Award dawngte hnenah lawmman Trophy leh Certificate a hlan a; Minister of State for Panchayati Raj, Prof. S.P Singh Baghel chuan kalkhawmte hnenah lawmpuina leh fuihna thu a sawi bawk a ni.

Mizoram atanga Localization of Sustainable Development Goals (LSDG) Theme – 5 ‘Clean & Green Village’ category hnuaia Deen Dayal Upadhyay Panchayat Satat Vikas Puraskar (DDUPSVP) lawmman dawgtu Kawrthah North Village Council te pawhin Hon’ble Minister of Panchayati Raj, Pu Rajiv Ranjan Singh (Pu Lalan Singh tia hriat ni bawk) hnen atangin lawmman Trophy leh Certificate an dawng a. Lawmman pawisafai Rs. 1 crore (cheng vaibelchhe khat) chu Kawrthah North Village Council Bank Account-ah thunluh fel tawh a ni. Hei hi khaw hmasawnna hna thawh nan tangkai tak hman tura ruahman a ni.

Kawrthah North Village Council te hi Department Officials – Pu Laltanpuia Hnamte, Joint Secretary, RD&AD; Dr.Lalngura Tlau, Director, Directorate of Local Administration, RD&AD leh Pu Lalchawimawia, Joint Director (A), Directorate of Local Administration, RD&AD ten an tawimawm a ni.

Kawrthah North Village Council ten LSDG Theme 5 ‘Clean & Green Village’ category hnuaia DDUPSVP lawmman pakhatna an dawng thei hi an khawtlang mipui ten Sawrkar hmalakna hrang hrang tha taka an thlawp vang leh theih tawp an chhuah vang a ni a, Sawrkar leh Department chuan lawmman pakhatna an dawng thei hi a lawmpui takzet a ni.

Attachment

title: SERCHHIP DISTRICT-A BLO LEH ADDITIONAL BLO TE TAN ‘TRAINING ON DIGITIZATION OF ENUMERATION FORMS’ BUATSAIH A NI.
content:
848/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, the 5thJune 2026:Special Intensive Revision (SIR) 2026 kalpui mekah vawiin khan Serchhip District-a Polling Station hrang hranga BLO leh Addl. BLO te tan, BLO Apps-a Enumeration Forms ziah luh dan, ‘Training on Digitization of Enumeration Forms’ buatsaih a ni a. Serchhip, Thenzawl, E. Lungdar leh N. Vanlaiphai-ah te training hi neih niin, nimin khan Chhingchhip leh Khumtung-ahte neih a lo ni tawh bawk.

Vawiina Digitization Training hi, Serchhip-ah chuan Serchhip DC Pisapui Hall-ah neih niin Serchhip I-XII, New Serchhip I-V, Hriangtlang, Keitum I&II, Bungtlang I&II, Sialhau, Chhiahtlang I-V Polling Station amite an tel a. E. Lungdarah chuan BDO Office ah neih niin E. Lungdar I-III, Biate I & II, Mualcheng I& II, Leng, Sailulak amite an tel a; N. Vanlaiphai I-IV, Lungkawlh, Bawktlang, Sialsir, Lungchhuan, Chekawn Khawlailung I&II, Piler tan N. Vanlaiphai SDO (C) Office ah neih ni bawkin, Thenzawl I-X, Buangpui, Neihloh te tan SDO (C) Office, Thenzawl-ah Training hi neih a ni bawk a. Heng bakah hian Rullam, Lungpho, Ngentiang, Thinglian, Hmunzawl leh Vanchengte amite’n an remchanna hmunah training hi an zawm ve bawk a ni.

Nimin khan Serchhip District-ah chuan Enumeration Form 100% sem zawh a ni tawh a; Enumeration Form te hi inziaklut turte’n an dahkhah zawhah BLO te hnenah thehluh leh tur a ni a, BLO te hian Enumeration Form dahkhah tawh sate chu ‘BLO App’ hmang hian computer system-ah an thehlut (enter) leh vek dawn a ni.

Attachment
